steps.title: Find the sculpture contrast
steps.content: The goal is to contrast the two sculptures. The notes show that Bellandi's Release depicts Nelson Mandela, a human subject, while Wakefield's Digital Orca depicts a whale.

steps.title: Avoid shared or one-sided facts
steps.content: A falsely treats public display as a contrast even though both works are public art. B gives a similarity. D describes only Digital Orca without contrasting it with Release. The useful contrast is human subject versus whale. The answer is C.
